appBearerAuth.description: Use `Authorization: Bearer <APP_ACCESS_TOKEN>`. This is the access token returned by POST /api/v1/auth/session or POST /api/v1/auth/refresh, and is used for protected API calls.

firebase_id_token.description: Firebase ID token from the Firebase client SDK (sent in the request body for session bootstrap).

role.description: Server-managed role (defaults to student). Clients cannot set this value.

session_id.description: Session identifier (also used as the refresh token). Store this if you plan to refresh or to logout with a Firebase token (via x-session-id).

access_token.description: App access token. Use this as `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` for protected API calls.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token (same value as session.session_id). Send this in POST /api/v1/auth/refresh.

plan.description: Current plan/package code (e.g. free, pro, or an admin-created package code).

estimated_credits.description: Total credits reserved up-front for the whole batch.

url.description: WebSocket URL to subscribe to batch progress updates.

token.description: JWT used to authenticate the WebSocket connection.

schema.description: Filter by plan/package code (e.g. free, pro).

post.summary: Adjust user credits (admin only)
Create a Stripe-backed plan/package (admin only)
Create a Stripe-backed credit pack (admin only)
Create a model config (admin only)
Create Stripe billing portal session for user (admin only)
Change user subscription plan (admin only)
Retry paying a Stripe invoice (admin only)
Create a Stripe refund for a payment (admin only)
Cancel user subscription at period end (admin only)

get.summary: Get a user credit ledger history (admin only)

post.summary: Bootstrap auth session (register-or-login)
post.description: Single entry auth endpoint. Send `firebase_id_token` in the JSON body (a Firebase ID token from the Firebase client SDK). Backend verifies the token using Firebase Admin SDK, syncs profile from Firebase, creates user/subscription if first login, and returns an app access token plus refresh/session token. Use the returned `auth.access_token` as the Bearer token for other protected API calls.

201.description: New user auto-registered and session created.

delete.description: Logs out the current app session by revoking the session/refresh token (session.session_id). This also immediately invalidates any app access tokens issued for that session (they are checked against the active session in the database). Authenticate using the app access token (from `auth.access_token`).

post.summary: Refresh app access token
post.description: No Authorization header required. Provide `refresh_token` (same value as `session.session_id`) to rotate the refresh/session and receive a new `auth.access_token` plus new `session.session_id`.

post.summary: Create a Stripe Checkout Session for a subscription plan
Create a Stripe Checkout session for a subscription plan
Purchase a one-off credit pack (Stripe Checkout)

get.summary: Get current subscription and recent invoices

post.summary: Cancel subscription at end of billing period
Stripe webhook (public)

get.summary: Get current credit balance and period usage

post.summary: Upload PDF
Upload raw text

get.summary: List study-set batches for a document

post.summary: Generate study set materials (notes, flashcards, multiple choice, etc.)
post.description: Creates a batch and enqueues one job per requested type. Jobs run once by default (no automatic retries). Use the returned WebSocket token to subscribe to batch events.

202.description: Batch created, jobs enqueued, websocket token returned.

get.description: Returns a Server-Sent Events stream. Events: metadata, delta, done.

Submit a rubric + assignment for grading
